steps.t: The vicious cat Mirefang can be found to the west of Estolad Mernael, near the Pool of Creeping Death. You should summon and defeat this vicious hunte…
Laidhriel awaits you at the entrance to Estolad Mernael in the Drownholt, east of Mirefang's lair. You should return to Laidhriel and inform her of yo…
